SHORT NAME: MORTALITIES 

LONG NAME: MORTALITIES 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

FILE(S): Hospital 

SOURCE: AHCAH facility-submitted data 

VALUES: 0, 1+ 

COMMENT: Occasionally a negative value may appear in a data submission; theses are corrections to prior data. 
Data users should interpret the negative values to mean zero (no mortalities). 

The data submission period represents the data
